zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Booth於1386年出生在英國藍卡爾巴頓時，她的父親John Boothe of Barton, Esq.33歲，母親Lady Joanna Trafford28歲。她於1419年與Sir Thomas Southworth在英國藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1432年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利享年46歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Booth于1386年出生在英国藍卡爾巴頓时，她的父亲John Boothe of Barton, Esq.33岁，母亲Lady Joanna Trafford28岁。她于1419年与Sir Thomas Southworth在英国藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1432年在英国英格兰藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利享年46岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Booth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): topographic or occupational name from Middle English bothe (Old Danish bōth) ‘temporary shelter, such as a covered market stall or a cattle-herdsman's hut’. The latter sense was predominant in the Pennines of Lancashire and Yorkshire, where there were many cattle farms or vaccaries, and whose subdivisions were known as ‘booths’. The principal meaning of the surname there was therefore probably ‘cattle herdsman’, ‘man in charge of a vaccary’, and thus identical with Boothman . Elsewhere it may have denoted a shopkeeper who owned a temporary market stall, but no evidence has been found to confirm this use of the surname. In the British Isles the surname is still more common in northern England, where Scandinavian influence was more marked, and in Scotland, where the word was borrowed into Gaelic as both(an).
History: Robert Booth (1604–72) is mentioned in the colonial records of Exeter, NH, in 1645. He subsequently moved to ME.

variants.name: Boothman
meanings: English (northern): occupational name from Middle English both (Old Danish bōth) ‘temporary shelter, such as a covered market stall or a cattle-herdsman's hut’ + man. In the Pennine uplands of northern England, where booths were subdivisons of vaccaries or cattle-rearing establishment, the name probably denoted a herdsman who looked after cattle, perhaps a man in charge of a vaccary. Elsewhere the surname might have denoted a shopkeeper but evidence for this lacking. Alternatively, the name can also be an occupational name for a servant of a man surnamed Booth .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Booth was born in 1386, in Barton, Lancashire, England, her father, John Boothe of Barton, Esq., was 33 and her mother, Lady Joanna Trafford, was 28. She married Sir Thomas Southworth in 1419, in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1432, in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46, and was buried in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Booth est née en 1386, à Barton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, John Boothe of Barton, Esq., avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lady Joanna Trafford, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Southworth en 1419, à Samlesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1432, à Samlesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Samlesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Booth 1386 in Barton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Boothe of Barton, Esq. 33 und ihre Mutter Lady Joanna Trafford 28. Sie hat 1419 in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England Sir Thomas Southworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1432 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Booth è nata il nel 1386 nel Barton, Lancashire, England, sua padre, John Boothe of Barton, Esq., aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Lady Joanna Trafford, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Southworth nel 1419, nel Samlesbury, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1432, nel Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Samlesbury, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Boothが1386年にイギリスランカシュアイアバートンで生まれた時，父John Boothe of Barton, Esq.は33歳，母Lady Joanna Traffordは28歳であった。1419年にイギリスランカシュアイアサムレスブリーでSir Thomas Southworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1432年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアサムレスブリーで46歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアサムレスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Booth(이)가 1386년 영국 랭카실르 바턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Boothe of Barton, Esq.(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joanna Trafford(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1419년 영국 랭카실르 샘레스버이에서 Sir Thomas Southworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1432년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 샘레스버이에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 샘레스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Booth nasceu em 1386, em Barton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Boothe of Barton, Esq., tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joanna Trafford, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Southworth em 1419, em Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1432, em Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Booth родилась в 1386 г. в местности бартон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Boothe of Barton, Esq. было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Joanna Trafford, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Southworth в 1419 г. в местности сэмлесбури, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1432 г. в местности сэмлесбури, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности сэмлесбури, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Booth nació en 1386, en Barton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Boothe of Barton, Esq., tenía 33 años y su mamá, Lady Joanna Trafford, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Southworth en 1419, en Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1432, en Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
